description: Local-only validation of a source directory (no API calls). Checks .platform files, item types, and definition structure.

warnings: DailyETL.Notebook: references logical ID c1d2e3f4-a5b6-7890-cdef-0123456789ab not found in source

notes: Validate runs entirely offline (no Fabric API calls, no auth required). Checks: .platform file presence and schema, item type validity, definition part structure, logical ID cross-references. Use before 'deploy plan' to catch structural issues early. Non-zero exit on errors; warnings are informational.

query_examples.description: Fatal errors that would block deployment.
